query:
-- Miami (FL) @ Purdue: 8:10 AM PST, DK NJ: +7.5/-7.5, 147.5, ML: +260/-325
UPDATE games SET 
  startTimeEst = '08:10 AM',
  awayBookSpread = 7.5, homeBookSpread = -7.5,
  bookTotal = 147.5,
  awayML = 260, homeML = -325
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-22' AND awayTeam = 'miami_fl' AND homeTeam = 'purdue' AND sport = 'NCAAM';
